subcodes.first_line: O compassionate Lord! This gathering is beneath the shelter of Thy mercy, and these souls are turned toward Thy Kingdom, O my God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: خداوند مهربانا این جمع در ظل رحمت تواند و این نفوس متوجه بملکوت تو خدایا
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @prayer for unity
